nasb.text: But the Lord said to him, ‘Take off the sandals from your feet, for the place on which you are standing is holy ground.

esv.text: Then the Lord said to him, ‘Take off the sandals from your feet, for the place where you are standing is holy ground.

cnv.text: 主對他說：‘把你腳上的鞋脫掉，因為你所站的地方是聖地。

ccb.text: 主又说，‘脱下你脚上的鞋子，因为你所站的地方是圣地。

csbs.text: “主对他说： ‘脱掉你脚上的鞋，因为你站的地方是圣地。
